creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

To submitter: Do you know if this problem still exists in newer versions 
of FreeBSD, or if it has been fixed since the PR was submitted?  If you  
are still able to test, it would be useful if you could establish if 
the problem still exists in 7.2, and 8.0.  Thanks!
